name: Fukushima Galilei Co.Ltd.
summary: Fukushima Galilei Co.Ltd. manufactures, sells, and maintains commercial freezer refrigerators, refrigerated showcases, and other refrigeration devices in Japan and internationally. Its products include blast chillers, refrigerated showcases, and RO water generation devices. The company also designs and constructs shop and kitchen systems. The company was formerly known as Fukushima Industries Corp. and changed its name to Fukushima Galilei Co.Ltd. in December 2019. Fukushima Galilei Co.Ltd. was founded in 1951 and is headquartered in Osaka, Japan.
